title: Life-orchard
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Life_orchid.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A life-orchid]]
'''Life-orchards''' were found on planets in the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]] and were where [[life-crystal]]s were harvested from [[Life-crystal tree|life-trees]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Mindharp of Sharu]]''
